---
title: "Citation Network"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

An interactive visualization of the co-citation network among 190 references in the TCBL review. References cited together in the same section are connected. Node size reflects citation frequency; colors indicate the primary section.

```{=html}
<style>
  #network-container {
    width: 100%;
    height: 75vh;
    border: 1px solid #ddd;
    border-radius: 8px;
    background: #fafafa;
    position: relative;
  }
  .network-controls {
    padding: 12px 20px;
    display: flex;
    gap: 12px;
    align-items: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    background: white;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
    border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0;
  }
  .network-controls button {
    padding: 5px 14px;
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
    border-radius: 4px;
    background: white;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 13px;
  }
  .network-controls button:hover { background: #f0f0f0; }
  .network-controls select {
    padding: 5px 10px;
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
    border-radius: 4px;
    font-size: 13px;
  }
  .legend {
    display: flex;
    gap: 16px;
    font-size: 12px;
    align-items: center;
    margin-left: auto;
  }
  .legend-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 4px;
  }
  .legend-dot {
    width: 12px;
    height: 12px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: inline-block;
  }
  .tooltip {
    position: absolute;
    background: white;
    border: 1px solid #ddd;
    border-radius: 6px;
    padding: 10px 14px;
    font-size: 13px;
    pointer-events: none;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
    max-width: 300px;
    z-index: 1000;
    display: none;
  }
</style>

<div class="network-controls">
  <strong>Citation Network</strong>
  <button onclick="resetZoom()">🔄 Reset</button>
  <select id="filter-category" onchange="filterCategory()">
    <option value="all">All Categories</option>
    <option value="Introduction">Introduction</option>
    <option value="Full-physics">Full-physics Models</option>
    <option value="Diagnostic">Diagnostic Models</option>
    <option value="Data-driven">Data-driven Methods</option>
    <option value="NatHaz">NatHaz Investigation</option>
  </select>
  <div class="legend">
    <span class="legend-item"><span class="legend-dot" style="background:#e74c3c"></span> Introduction</span>
    <span class="legend-item"><span class="legend-dot" style="background:#3498db"></span> Full-physics</span>
    <span class="legend-item"><span class="legend-dot" style="background:#2ecc71"></span> Diagnostic</span>
    <span class="legend-item"><span class="legend-dot" style="background:#f39c12"></span> Data-driven</span>
    <span class="legend-item"><span class="legend-dot" style="background:#9b59b6"></span> NatHaz</span>
  </div>
</div>
<div id="network-container">
  <div class="tooltip" id="tooltip"></div>
</div>

<script src="https://d3js.org/d3.v7.min.js"></script>
<script>
const categoryColors = {
  'Introduction': '#e74c3c',
  'Full-physics': '#3498db',
  'Diagnostic': '#2ecc71',
  'Data-driven': '#f39c12',
  'NatHaz': '#9b59b6',
  'Conclusions': '#95a5a6'
};

const container = document.getElementById('network-container');
const width = container.clientWidth;
const height = container.clientHeight;
const tooltip = document.getElementById('tooltip');

const svg = d3.select('#network-container')
  .append('svg')
  .attr('width', width)
  .attr('height', height);

const g = svg.append('g');

// Zoom
const zoom = d3.zoom()
  .scaleExtent([0.2, 5])
  .on('zoom', (e) => g.attr('transform', e.transform));
svg.call(zoom);

function resetZoom() {
  svg.transition().duration(500).call(zoom.transform, d3.zoomIdentity);
}

// Load data
fetch('citation_network.json')
  .then(r => r.json())
  .then(data => {
    const nodes = data.nodes;
    const links = data.edges.map(e => ({
      source: e.source,
      target: e.target,
      weight: e.weight
    }));

    // Simulation
    const simulation = d3.forceSimulation(nodes)
      .force('link', d3.forceLink(links).id(d => d.id).distance(80).strength(d => d.weight * 0.1))
      .force('charge', d3.forceManyBody().strength(-120))
      .force('center', d3.forceCenter(width / 2, height / 2))
      .force('collision', d3.forceCollide().radius(d => d.size + 2))
      .force('x', d3.forceX(width / 2).strength(0.05))
      .force('y', d3.forceY(height / 2).strength(0.05));

    // Links
    const link = g.append('g')
      .selectAll('line')
      .data(links)
      .join('line')
      .attr('stroke', '#ddd')
      .attr('stroke-width', d => Math.min(d.weight, 4))
      .attr('stroke-opacity', 0.4);

    // Nodes
    const node = g.append('g')
      .selectAll('circle')
      .data(nodes)
      .join('circle')
      .attr('r', d => d.size)
      .attr('fill', d => categoryColors[d.category] || '#999')
      .attr('stroke', '#fff')
      .attr('stroke-width', 1.5)
      .attr('cursor', 'pointer')
      .call(d3.drag()
        .on('start', dragstarted)
        .on('drag', dragged)
        .on('end', dragended));

    // Labels for all nodes
    const label = g.append('g')
      .selectAll('text')
      .data(nodes)
      .join('text')
      .text(d => d.short)
      .attr('font-size', d => d.citations >= 3 ? '11px' : '8px')
      .attr('font-weight', d => d.citations >= 3 ? 'bold' : 'normal')
      .attr('fill', '#333')
      .attr('dx', d => d.size + 3)
      .attr('dy', 4)
      .style('pointer-events', 'none');

    // Tooltip
    node.on('mouseover', (e, d) => {
      tooltip.style.display = 'block';
      tooltip.innerHTML = `<strong>${d.label}</strong><br>
        Category: ${d.category}<br>
        Cited in ${d.citations} section(s)<br>
        Year: ${d.year}`;
      
      // Highlight connected
      const connected = new Set();
      links.forEach(l => {
        if (l.source.id === d.id) connected.add(l.target.id);
        if (l.target.id === d.id) connected.add(l.source.id);
      });
      
      node.attr('opacity', n => connected.has(n.id) || n.id === d.id ? 1 : 0.15);
      link.attr('stroke-opacity', l => 
        l.source.id === d.id || l.target.id === d.id ? 0.8 : 0.05);
      link.attr('stroke', l =>
        l.source.id === d.id || l.target.id === d.id ? categoryColors[d.category] : '#ddd');
      label.attr('opacity', n => connected.has(n.id) || n.id === d.id ? 1 : 0.1);
    })
    .on('mousemove', (e) => {
      tooltip.style.left = (e.offsetX + 15) + 'px';
      tooltip.style.top = (e.offsetY - 10) + 'px';
    })
    .on('mouseout', () => {
      tooltip.style.display = 'none';
      node.attr('opacity', 1);
      link.attr('stroke-opacity', 0.4).attr('stroke', '#ddd');
      label.attr('opacity', 1);
    });

    // Click to link to article reference
    node.on('click', (e, d) => {
      window.open(`index.html#${d.id}`, '_blank');
    });

    // Tick
    simulation.on('tick', () => {
      link
        .attr('x1', d => d.source.x)
        .attr('y1', d => d.source.y)
        .attr('x2', d => d.target.x)
        .attr('y2', d => d.target.y);
      node
        .attr('cx', d => d.x)
        .attr('cy', d => d.y);
      label
        .attr('x', d => d.x)
        .attr('y', d => d.y);
    });

    // Filter
    window.filterCategory = function() {
      const cat = document.getElementById('filter-category').value;
      if (cat === 'all') {
        node.attr('opacity', 1);
        link.attr('stroke-opacity', 0.4);
        label.attr('opacity', 1);
      } else {
        node.attr('opacity', d => d.category === cat ? 1 : 0.08);
        link.attr('stroke-opacity', l => {
          const sMatch = (typeof l.source === 'object' ? l.source.category : '') === cat;
          const tMatch = (typeof l.target === 'object' ? l.target.category : '') === cat;
          return (sMatch && tMatch) ? 0.6 : 0.02;
        });
        label.attr('opacity', d => d.category === cat ? 1 : 0.08);
      }
    };

    function dragstarted(e, d) {
      if (!e.active) simulation.alphaTarget(0.3).restart();
      d.fx = d.x; d.fy = d.y;
    }
    function dragged(e, d) { d.fx = e.x; d.fy = e.y; }
    function dragended(e, d) {
      if (!e.active) simulation.alphaTarget(0);
      d.fx = null; d.fy = null;
    }
  });
</script>
```
